zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur於大約1259年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安時，他的父親Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur20歲，母親Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys18歲。他和Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1310年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾可華拉安享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur于大约1259年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安时，他的父亲Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur20岁，母亲Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys18岁。他和Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1310年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾可華拉安享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffyd

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur was born about 1259, in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur, was 20 and his mother, Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, was 18. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. He died about 1310, in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur est né environ 1259, à Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. Il est décédé environ 1310, à Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur um 1259 in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur 20 und seine Mutter Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys 18. Er hatte mit Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1310 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur è nato il circa 1259 nel Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. Morì circa 1310, nel Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddurが約1259年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコチウィランで生まれた時，父Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddurは20歳，母Morfydd Verch Ap Rhysは18歳であった。彼はMrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudorとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1310年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコチウィランで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur(이)가 대략 1259년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 코ch윌런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1310년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 코ch윌런에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur nasceu aproximadamente 1259, em Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1310, em Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur родился около 1259 г. в местности кочвиллан, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. Он умер около 1310 г. в местности кочвиллан, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffyd ap Tudor ap Madog ap Larddur nació aproximadamente 1259, en Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Mrs. Gruffydd Ap Tudor. Murió aproximadamente 1310, en Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 53 años.
